title: Ganesha Beginnings Coloring Book
imagePrompt: Premium child-friendly Hindu coloring book, clean black outlines, white background, large colorable areas, respectful Ganesha iconography, temple border, no dense shading, no tiny text.

title: Dashavatara Symbol Coloring Book
imagePrompt: Ten-avatar Vishnu coloring book, one clear avatar per page, thick clean black outlines, large open shapes, respectful symbols, simple temple border, no crowding.

title: Shani Dev Discipline Coloring Pages
imagePrompt: Older-kid devotional coloring pages for Shani Dev, dignified and calm, clean black outlines, crow, oil lamp, sesame, Saturn motif, no frightening imagery.

title: Core Deity Symbols Coloring Book
